decision_scope: pip package pyjwt at version 2.13.0, as pinned in requirements.txt
surface_text: Staging ran the token-forgery reproduction directly against the auth service an hour ago and the forged token was rejected on the upgraded build; the linked advisory is attached for the record. Decide how to respond to the staging result.
